name: Wardha Road
metaTitle: Property in Wardha Road Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Wardha Road Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Wardha Road is Nagpur's most important arterial road, stretching from the heart of the city to the international airport and MIHAN. It passes through localities like Somalwada, Besa, Beltarodi, Jamtha, and Sumthana, offering a mix of residential, commercial, and investment opportunities. The corridor has been significantly upgraded with widened roads, flyovers, and metro connectivity planned. Properties along Wardha Road continue to see steady appreciation, and it remains the strongest investment corridor in Nagpur in 2025. Mahalaxmi Infra has multiple ongoing projects along this corridor, all NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved.
whyInvest: Connects city centre to MIHAN and International Airport
Established social infrastructure — schools, hospitals, malls
Metro connectivity planned for key nodes
Multiple Mahalaxmi Infra projects active here

faqs.question: Why is Wardha Road the best location to buy property?
faqs.answer: Wardha Road connects central Nagpur to MIHAN, AIIMS, IIM, and the international airport with excellent infrastructure and resale value.

faqs.question: What localities are on Wardha Road Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Key localities include Somalwada, Besa, Beltarodi, Jamtha, Sumthana, and Shankarpur.

faqs.question: What is the price of plots on Wardha Road Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Mahalaxmi Infra projects on Wardha Road corridor start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for an updated price list.
